name: Canoe Belway
description:
__Race:__ Raccoon
__Height:__ 155 cm (5'1")
__Affiliation:__ Soma Familia
__Level:__ 1
__Weapon:__ Magic Sword

An adventurer from the Soma Familia. Canoe was crafty and greedy. He often beat Lili and stole the money and items that she had collected. He also betrayed Ged Raish after they ambushed Lili in the Dungeon, causing his death when he tried to escape, only to be killed by the approaching Killer Ants. His greed ultimately led to his demise as he let loose the Minotaur Ottar had tamed. 

(Source: Danmachi Wiki)
